user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Wide World Importers.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-27 14:54 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with consumption trend. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
Date: 2024-02-03 16:45 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-15 16:59 EST
Subject: URGENT: consumption trend Issue at Wide World Importers

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Wide World Importers
Date: 2024-02-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft), Michelle (Wide World Importers)

[00:02:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on consumption trend from our last session.

[00:05:00] Michelle (Wide World Importers): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?

[00:07:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:12:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] Michelle (Wide World Importers): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is security compliance.

[00:19:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.
